misconception_description: Substitutes u but leaves dx unconverted
error_signature: integrand still contains dx after substitution
remediation_hint: Differentiate u to relate du and dx
metaphor_description: Integral as accumulating area under a curve
error_patterns: picks u that doesn't simplify the integrand

misconception_description: Keeps original x bounds after substituting in a definite integral
error_signature: definite integral evaluated with x-limits on a u integrand
remediation_hint: Convert bounds via u(x) or back-substitute before evaluating
metaphor_description: Substitution as relabeling the axis with a new variable
error_patterns: forgets to divide by the constant factor from du
